site.name: Prometheus
site.metaDescription: Binary-first rendering pipeline with fragment-addressable delivery, edge-ready caching, and zero-hydration UX.

presets.title: Full Showcase
presets.description: The default branch preset with the complete reusable showcase surface enabled.

presets.title: Lean Starter
presets.description: A minimal template preset that keeps auth, account, and a starter home composition.

presets.title: Marketing Starter
presets.description: A site-first preset for branded marketing pages without authenticated product flows.

presets.title: SaaS Starter
presets.description: A product shell preset with auth, account, starter home content, and optional analytics.

presets.title: Commerce Starter
presets.description: A commerce-oriented preset with account, catalog, starter home content, and installability.

presets.title: Community Starter
presets.description: A communication-first preset with auth, messaging, starter home content, and realtime hooks.

bundles.title: Auth
bundles.description: Self-hosted Better Auth on Convex, bootstrap tokens, and the login route.
migrations: Better Auth base path, JWT issuer/audience, and JWKS settings must stay in sync across Convex, the site bundle, the Rust API, and the SpacetimeDB module.

OAuth callbacks must include https://prometheus.dev/api/auth/callback/google, https://prometheus.dev/api/auth/callback/facebook, https://prometheus.dev/api/auth/callback/twitter, https://prometheus.prod/api/auth/callback/google, https://prometheus.prod/api/auth/callback/facebook, and https://prometheus.prod/api/auth/callback/twitter. Better Auth uses provider id "twitter" for X, and the X app must request the user.email scope.

bundles.title: Store
bundles.description: Catalog, cart, and store mutation routes backed by starter data or live inventory.
migrations: Store bundle expects matching catalog and mutation support.

bundles.title: Lab
bundles.description: Reusable experimentation surface for prototyping new fragments and UI ideas.
migrations: Lab is intentionally starter-safe and should remain optional.

bundles.title: Messaging
bundles.description: Protected chat routes, P2P mailbox flows, and push notifications.
migrations: Push provider env keys must match the enabled delivery adapters.

bundles.title: Account
bundles.description: Profile, settings, and dashboard routes for authenticated users.
migrations: Account routes assume auth bundle remains enabled.

bundles.title: Home Demos
bundles.description: Shared home route composition and starter-safe fragment demos.
migrations: Starter-safe home copy should remain editable through template-config.

bundles.title: React Demo
bundles.description: Server-only React authoring demo compiled into binary fragments.
migrations: Keep React authoring server-only and out of the client ownership path.

bundles.title: Preact Demo
bundles.description: Reusable client island demo for progressive enhancement.
migrations: Islands should stay isolated from shell ownership.

bundles.title: WASM Demo
migrations: WASM demo assets must remain deterministic across builds.

bundles.title: Realtime
bundles.description: Realtime transport, collaboration, WebTransport, and signaling services.
migrations: Realtime profile changes require matching API, relay, and client env updates.

bundles.title: PWA
bundles.description: Offline route, manifest, and service worker integration.
migrations: Service worker and manifest changes should ship together.

bundles.title: Analytics
bundles.description: Analytics beacon, Highlight, and Partytown integrations.
migrations: Analytics integrations stay opt-in and should never become hard requirements.

bundles.title: Native
bundles.description: Native shell affordances and mobile-only entry points.
migrations: Native affordances must preserve browser fallbacks.
